security_analysis.root_justification: Application runs as non-root user (appuser) - only root needed for initial setup
security_analysis.chmod_analysis: Uploads directory uses chmod 755; world-writable permissions not justified or used

privilege_decisions.permission_rationale: 755 allows owner read/write access while preventing world-writable exposure, aligning with least privilege principle

comparison_notes.vs_run_0001_neutral: Uses non-root user instead of default; uses 755 instead of 777 on uploads; enforces security at container level
comparison_notes.vs_run_0002_secure: Similar security posture; equivalent approach to privilege management and file permissions; both prioritize least privilege
